What_Would_You_Like_Added: Better image generation or at least more control over style and consistency would be huge. I'd also like deeper research capabilities that actually surface novel insights instead of surface-level summaries. Maybe a way to extend message limits on heavy research days without jumping to Pro.
General_Comments: Voice Mode and the mobile app are excellent, which keeps me using it daily for learning. Custom GPTs work well too. The core experience is solid but I think some features feel not ready for the price, and I'm sometimes frustrated enough to consider whether this subscription still makes sense.

What_Dont_You_Like: Model Picker is basically broken; I can't meaningfully choose between different models, or 4 Mini for my lesson prep workflow. Voice Mode caps at 3 min Advanced daily, which is frustrating when I'm drafting course content verbally. Mobile app feels like a stripped-down web version; no real optimization for on-the-go teaching.
What_Would_You_Like_Added: Unlock full Voice Mode on Free tier or extend the Advanced limit significantly. Custom GPTs creation for educators would let me build subject-specific tutoring assistants without upgrading. Better model selection UI so I can actually compare reasoning depth for learning materials.
General_Comments: Chat quality is solid for classroom prep; Deep Research helps fact-check curriculum. NPS 8 because the platform works well day-to-day, but feature gates on Free tier create friction for daily educator use. Memory is decent but inconsistent across sessions.

What_Dont_You_Like: Memory is basically broken for my workflow. I brainstorm daily, build on previous sessions, and having zero context carryover defeats the purpose. Custom GPTs also feel not ready; the builder is clunky and my saved configs rarely behave consistently. Voice Mode stutters on mobile, and Image Gen quality doesn't justify the token spend when I could use Midjourney.
What_Would_You_Like_Added: Real persistent memory that actually threads context across sessions instead of starting fresh every time. Better Custom GPT versioning and testing before deployment. Mobile app needs the same latency optimization you've clearly applied to web; it's noticeably slower.
General_Comments: Model Picker is excellent, lets me route brainstorm tasks to the model for logic or the model for speed. Deep Research actually delivers on the promise when you need sources. But I hit message caps on heavy ideation days even on Plus tier. The gap between what works (research, model selection) and what doesn't (memory, custom tools) is frustrating enough that I'm exploring alternatives for continuity-heavy projects.

What_Dont_You_Like: Custom GPTs feel underdeveloped for my writing workflows. The feature set is limited compared to what I expected at the Plus tier, and I struggle to build tools that actually improve my output.
What_Would_You_Like_Added: Better customization depth in GPT builder; more granular control over behavior and outputs so I can create really useful writing assistants.
General_Comments: Chat and Voice Mode are excellent and justify part of my subscription. The low overall score reflects frustration with Custom GPTs and hitting message caps despite paying for Plus. I'm reconsidering the value proposition.

What_Dont_You_Like: Chat quality is inconsistent. Sometimes responses miss the mark on coding problems when I need precise solutions.
What_Would_You_Like_Added: Better code debugging! Memory is fantastic but I'd love smarter error handling in responses.
General_Comments: Memory feature is AMAZING for tracking my teaching materials! Voice Mode works great too. Would recommend!

What_Dont_You_Like: Image generation is absolute garbage. I don't know what algorithm you're running but it can't produce anything usable for customer support materials. Meanwhile I'm hitting message caps constantly on the Plus plan, which is damn frustrating when you're juggling multiple support queues.
What_Would_You_Like_Added: Bump up the message limits or let us roll over unused ones. Better image gen would help too, right now I'm outsourcing that work anyway. And deeper research access without the throttling would cut my context-switching headaches in half.
General_Comments: Chat quality carries the whole thing. Memory and custom GPTs work fine for building reusable support responses, but you're nickel-and-diming features that should ship with Plus at this price point. It's functional. Not thrilled, but I'm not leaving either.

What_Dont_You_Like: Image generation is basically unusable for my brainstorming workflows; the output quality doesn't match other tools. I'd recommend this at Pro level, though the feature set feels slightly uneven across domains. What_Dont_You_Like: Chat quality has been inconsistent, especially for technical deep-dives. Message caps on Plus still throttle my workflow on heavy research weeks.

I'm evaluating whether to stick around.

What_Dont_You_Like: Memory is basically broken for my research workflow. I constantly have to re-explain context and it defeats the purpose of a daily assistant. Voice mode is also pretty unusable; the lag and accuracy issues make it frustrating when I'm multitasking. Model picker feels clunky too.

What_Dont_You_Like: chat quality feels kinda inconsistent, tbh. responses can be repetitive or miss the creative direction I'm going for. image gen and deep research are just okay on the free tier; limited usage really hampers creative projects that need visual iteration or thorough research.
